  PR title must be a valid Conventional Commit (e.g. "fix: correct apostrophe escaping").
  It becomes the squash-merge commit on main.
  CI gates format / lint / build / typecheck — no need to tick those by hand.
-->

## Key files to review

- `path/to/file` — what changed and why it matters
